title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The system includes four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, response) that coordinate to provide travel planning using Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs for real-time data.
